draft_body:
Hi Jane,

Just a quick follow-up on your EICR enquiry from earlier this week. If you're still looking for an electrician, we'd love to help — just reply to this message or give us a call at your convenience.

Tom, Bright Spark Electrical
operator_notes: First follow-up. Short and low-pressure. One more follow-up is permitted under the client config (max_followups: 2).
